# GitHub About Copy

这份文件用于统一 GitHub 仓库首页右侧 About 信息，避免 README、Release 与仓库信息各写各的。

## Description

一款为情侣记录而生的 WordPress 主题，以杂志感呈现故事、照片、清单与日常。

## Short English Description

An editorial-style WordPress theme for couples to publish stories, memories, lists, notes, blessings, and photo galleries.

## Website

https://www.1ink.ink/

## Suggested Topics

- wordpress
- wordpress-theme
- couple
- romantic
- storytelling
- gallery
- diary
- bootstrap
- photoswipe
- open-meteo

## Social Preview Alt

Brave Love 1.0 WordPress theme preview showing an editorial-style romantic homepage, story timeline, and mobile-friendly content cards.
